data.title: Create Restaurants to Absorb SFP Holdings in Bid to Streamline Governance and Bolster Restaurant Group Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

create restaurants holdings inc. ( (JP:3387) ) has provided an announcement.

Create Restaurants Holdings Inc., a multi-brand restaurant operator in Japan and overseas, has been pursuing a five-year medium-term plan to 2030 that emphasizes refining cuisine and service, M&A-driven growth and overseas expansion. Its consolidated subsidiary SFP Holdings Co., Ltd. operates well-known izakaya and dining brands such as Isomaru Suisan and Toriyoshi Shoten, with both companies having gradually integrated back-office and planning functions to raise efficiency.

The companies have agreed to an absorption-type merger making Create Restaurants the surviving entity and SFP Holdings the disappearing company, with the transaction scheduled to take effect on July 1, 2026. SFP Holdings’ shares are expected to be delisted from the Tokyo Stock Exchange on June 29, 2026, and the move is aimed at consolidating management resources, easing governance burdens associated with a listed subsidiary structure and enabling faster, unified strategic responses to structural challenges in Japan’s restaurant and izakaya sectors.

By eliminating the minority-shareholder constraints inherent in a dual-listed setup, Create Restaurants plans to optimize capital and human resource allocation across the group as it navigates labor shortages, cost pressures and changing consumer behavior, including weaker late-night and alcohol demand. The merger is positioned as a step to strengthen the group’s competitiveness and operational agility amid mounting regulatory and market pressures on listed subsidiary governance in Japan.

More about create restaurants holdings inc.

Create Restaurants Holdings Inc. operates a diversified restaurant business in Japan and overseas through 26 consolidated subsidiaries, pursuing a multi-brand, multi-location strategy under a medium-term plan running through fiscal 2030. Its subsidiary SFP Holdings Co., Ltd. focuses on specialized dining brands such as Isomaru Suisan and Toriyoshi Shoten, offering casual, relaxing food spaces and has been listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market since 2022.

The group has already integrated several shared functions, including accounting, HR, purchasing and store design, via joint ventures since 2020 to boost efficiency and streamline operations across the restaurant portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 1,439,360

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen324.8B

data.title: Gunosy Posts Higher Sales but Weaker Profits, Maintains Strong Balance Sheet and Dividend Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Gunosy, Inc. ( (JP:6047) ) has provided an update.

Gunosy reported consolidated net sales of ¥4,986 million for the nine months ended February 28, 2026, a 7.7% year-on-year increase, while operating profit dropped 60.0% to ¥237 million and ordinary profit fell 10.6% to ¥350 million, leaving profit attributable to owners of parent flat at ¥204 million. Despite the profit squeeze, the balance sheet remained solid with an equity-to-asset ratio of 86.7%, and the company plans a full-year dividend of ¥22.00 per share, including a special ¥3.70 component, signaling continued shareholder returns.

For the full year ending May 31, 2026, Gunosy forecasts modest net sales growth of 5.8% to ¥6,450 million and a sharp 56.6% decline in operating profit to ¥250 million, even as ordinary profit is projected to rise 10.6% and profit attributable to owners of parent to jump 69.6% on a low base. The guidance suggests ongoing top-line recovery but pressure on core operating margins, with management prioritizing capital efficiency and shareholder payouts against a backdrop of higher treasury share holdings and stable equity levels.

More about Gunosy, Inc.

Gunosy Inc. is a Japan-based technology company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that operates primarily in the digital media and internet services sector. The company focuses on providing news curation and related online services, monetizing its platforms mainly through digital advertising and affiliated content distribution in the domestic market.

Average Trading Volume: 225,293

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen12.24B

data.title: Raksul to Cancel Entire Treasury Shareholdings Ahead of Planned Share Consolidation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

RAKSUL INC. ( (JP:4384) ) just unveiled an update.

Raksul Inc. has resolved to cancel 1,403,466 of its common treasury shares, representing 2.30% of its issued shares, with the cancellation scheduled for June 1, 2026. The move, which will reduce the total number of issued shares to 59,584,826 and eliminate all treasury stock including restricted shares granted to directors, is contingent on shareholder approval of a planned share consolidation and is likely aimed at optimizing capital structure and improving capital efficiency for existing shareholders.

The cancellation covers all treasury shares currently held or to be reacquired, including stock-based compensation shares to be obtained without consideration by June 1, 2026. By retiring these shares ahead of the proposed consolidation and related governance changes, Raksul signals a more shareholder-friendly capital policy that could enhance per-share indicators and clarify its equity base ahead of the extraordinary general meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4384) stock is a Buy with a Yen1400.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on RAKSUL INC. stock, see the JP:4384 Stock Forecast page.

The company focuses on leveraging the internet to streamline traditionally offline industries, targeting efficiency gains and cost reductions for corporate and individual customers.

data.title: EAT&HOLDINGS Slashes Medium-Term Targets and Prepares New Growth Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

EAT&HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. ( (JP:2882) ) has shared an announcement.

EAT&HOLDINGS has sharply revised down the final-year targets of its three-year medium-term management plan for the fiscal year ending February 28, 2027, cutting projected net sales from ¥50.0 billion to ¥43.0 billion and halving operating profit guidance to ¥1.25 billion. The company now expects lower profitability, with operating margin trimmed to 2.9%, ROE to 4.0%, EPS to ¥40, and a reduced restaurant network goal of 500 stores instead of 650.

Management attributed the downgrade to a significantly tougher business environment than initially assumed, including higher raw material and energy costs and a slower-than-expected recovery and store expansion in its Restaurant Business despite steady growth in the Food Business. In response, EAT&HOLDINGS is developing a new medium- to long-term management plan aimed at a more reliable growth path, emphasizing dual-track management of restaurants and frozen foods, as well as overseas expansion and M&A, with detailed targets to be disclosed alongside first-quarter results for FY ending February 2027.

More about EAT&HOLDINGS Co., Ltd.

EAT&HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. operates in the food-related industry, with a business portfolio centered on its Restaurant Business and Frozen Food (Food) Business. Listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, the group focuses on both domestic and overseas restaurant operations while expanding its food business to support sustainable growth and enhance corporate value.

Average Trading Volume: 39,441

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen22.86B

data.title: Betsson Steps Up EUR 40m Buyback With New B-Share Purchases
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Betsson AB ( ($SE:BETS.B) ) has shared an update.

Betsson AB has repurchased 140,000 of its own series B shares on Nasdaq Stockholm between 7 and 10 April 2026, at a weighted average price of SEK 101.86 and a total value of about SEK 14.26 million. The transactions were executed by Arctic Securities on behalf of Betsson under the company’s ongoing share buyback programme of up to EUR 40 million, which runs until 30 April 2026 and follows EU safe-harbour rules.

Following these latest purchases, Betsson holds 4,719,942 series B shares and 2,747,433 series C shares out of a total 142,729,838 shares outstanding, tightening its free float while signalling continued confidence in its valuation and capital position. The accumulated volume under the buyback programme has reached 3,339,600 series B shares at a total cost of SEK 382.36 million, underscoring the company’s active approach to shareholder returns and balance-sheet optimisation.

More about Betsson AB

Betsson AB is a Stockholm-listed holding company focused on fast-growing businesses in the online gaming industry. The group is one of the leading global online gaming operators and aims to outpace market growth both organically and via acquisitions while maintaining profitability and sustainability. Its shares are traded on Nasdaq Stockholm’s Large Cap segment under the BETS-B ticker.

Average Trading Volume: 1,003,177

Wagners Holding Co. Ltd. ( (AU:WGN) ) has shared an update.

Wagners Holding Company director Denis Wagner has updated his disclosed interest in the company following a modest on-market share purchase. On 9 April 2026, Wagner acquired 24,972 ordinary shares at $4.00 each, lifting his total relevant interest from 60,029,351 to 60,054,323 shares across a combination of direct holdings and entities he controls.

The notice details that Wagner’s indirect interests include shares held via family trusts and entities, as well as a significant relevant interest arising from a shareholders’ pre-emption deed with other members of the Wagner family. This incremental increase in his already substantial stake reinforces the strong alignment between the director and other major family shareholders, underlining continued insider confidence and concentrated ownership in the company.

data.title: Anemoi Revamps Trasna Takeover Terms, Plans Share Consolidation and Warrant Offer
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Anemoi International Limited ( (GB:AMOI) ) has issued an announcement.

Anemoi International has signed an amended binding agreement to acquire 100% of Trasna Solutions FZ LLC via a reverse takeover that values Trasna at an enterprise value of $150 million, with consideration to be paid in new Anemoi shares priced at up to £0.02. The deal, which remains subject to due diligence, fundraise and regulatory approvals, will also see Anemoi seek readmission of the enlarged group to the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market and change its name to Trasna Ltd.

To manage the substantial increase in share count from the transaction, the board is considering a 1-for-100 share consolidation aimed at lifting the share price and improving marketability to a broader investor base. In parallel, existing warrant holders are being offered a voluntary surrender-and-subscription arrangement at £0.02 per share that could raise up to about £1.9 million, reduce perceived stock overhang, and strengthen the balance sheet ahead of completion of the reverse takeover.

Spark’s Take on AMOI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AMOI is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (declining small revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn). Technicals are a partial offset with price trading above key moving averages and a positive MACD, but valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on AMOI stock, click here.

More about Anemoi International Limited

Anemoi International Ltd is a London-listed company whose shares trade on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange in the Equity Shares (Commercial Companies) category. The group is repositioning itself through a reverse takeover of Trasna Solutions FZ LLC, after which it plans to rebrand as Trasna Ltd and pursue growth under the enlarged structure.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Finseta plc has detailed director and senior management participation in its recently announced fundraising, which comprises a placing, subscription and proposed retail offer. The company provides foreign exchange and multi-currency payment services, targeting business and individual clients who require complex cross-border transactions across a wide range of currencies and jurisdictions.

Five directors and persons discharging managerial responsibilities have subscribed for a total of 1,129,701 new shares, investing £96,025 at 8.5 pence per share, with Chief Commercial Officer Robert O’Brien taking the largest allocation. The independent directors, advised by Shore Capital, have deemed these related-party subscriptions fair and reasonable for shareholders, signalling internal confidence in the fundraising and the group’s strategic direction.

Kingfisher ( (GB:KGF) ) has issued an announcement.

Kingfisher plc has continued executing its previously announced £300 million capital return programme, repurchasing 500 ordinary shares for cancellation on 10 April 2026 via an on-exchange transaction with BNP Paribas SA. The modest buyback tranche underscores the group’s ongoing effort to return surplus capital to shareholders, which can enhance earnings per share and signals management’s confidence in the balance sheet and long-term cash generation.

The transaction was carried out in line with London Stock Exchange rules and the UK version of the EU Market Abuse Regulation, with detailed trade data made available through the exchange’s disclosure platform. For investors, the programme provides incremental support to the share price and clarifies Kingfisher’s capital allocation priorities at a time when retailers face a challenging consumer and macroeconomic backdrop.
